stemHtml:
A Lambert conformal conic chart having standard parallels at 54°N and 59°N is used for navigation. The straight line between A 55° 00.0’N, 165° 00.0’E and B 58° 00.0’N,’E is drawn on this chart. The True track along the straight line at A is 301° and at B is 292°.

Calculate the difference in longitude from A to B.
